description: Established VANTAGE-ALPHA baseline: Full LATO glyph library, refined XCS bounding box/offset logic, and 2mm label gaps. Validated 'good enough' for production despite minor XCS baseline height shifts.
Sequence 01: Mirror Steering & Divergence. Galvo vs Gantry mass limits. Failure: Fuzzy corners from high divergence. Success: Low divergence (1.5mrad) consistency.
Sequence 02: The Focus Hourglass. Rayleigh Range and DOF. Failure: Kerf taper in thick stock. Success: Focus positioning 1/3 into material.
Sequence 03: Wavelength Absorption. IR (1064nm) vs Blue (455nm) material coupling. Failure: Beam passing through clear acrylic. Success: Matching wavelength to substrate.
Sequence 04: The Spot & The Gap. LPCM vs Spot geometry. Failure: White striping from low density. Success: Perfect Overlap (~333 LPCM).
Sequence 05: The Speed Reciprocal. 1/x heat relationship. Failure: Exponential burning at low speeds (<5mm/s). Success: Stable energy in high-speed flat range.
Sequence 06: Energy Fluence (J/mm^2). The Fundamental Dose calculation. Failure: Under-threshold marks. Success: Dose balancing for specific outcomes.
Sequence 07: Thermal Diffusion (k). Lateral heat spread limits. Failure: Blurry edges in high-k Copper. Success: High-speed compensation for k.
Sequence 08: The Heat Wall. Neighborhood pre-heating effects. Failure: Small logo melting while large design is perfect. Success: Scaling power for area size.
Sequence 09: The 10ms Limit. Thermal Return Time compounding. Failure: Design melting from <10ms cycles. Success: Dispersive cooling path strategies.
Sequence 10: Thermal Equilibrium. Plateaus and Heat Creep. Failure: Thermal Runaway (burning halfway through a job). Success: Inter-pass cooling steady-state.
Sequence 11: Surface Roughness (Ra). Specular vs Diffuse. Failure: High Ra 'Sandpaper' effect (matte). Success: Low Ra Mirror Finish preserving specular reflection.
Sequence 12: Thin-Film Interference. Color physics of Cr2O3. Failure: The 'White Gap' transition look. Success: Radiant interference colors from specular bloom.
Sequence 13: Parabolic Growth. The Oxidation Diffusion Barrier. Failure: Linear Fallacy (stalled color growth). Success: Overcoming resistance with peak dose.
Sequence 14: The Corrosion Limit. Chromium Depletion (Sensitization). Failure: 'The Hidden Rust'. Success: Preserving passivation through heat gating.
Sequence 15: Galvo Dynamics. Mirror acceleration and Offset. Failure: Corner ghosting/rounding at 2000mm/s. Success: Sharp corners via delay calibration.
Sequence 16: Scanning Strategies. Raster vs Vector Fill physics. Failure: Hot corner buildup from crosshatch overlap. Success: Optimized hatch patterns.
Sequence 17: Achieving Green. Digital Calibration and Reproducibility. Failure: Trial-and-error guesswork. Success: Matching simulation 'Green' zone to real results.
Sequence 18: The PVC Deadline. Chemical safety and class 4 hazards. Failure: Corroded lens from HCl gas. Success: Exhaust standards and substrate validation.
Module 01: Ray Marching & SDFs. The Geometry of Rays and Distance Fields.
Module 02: Volume Integration. Discretized Volume Rendering and Transmittance.
Module 03: Neural Radiance Fields. Neural Implicit Representations with MLPs and Positional Encoding.
Module 03a: The Learning Process (Gradient Descent). Interactive 2D visualization of the training loop, calculus derivatives, and weight updates.
Module 04: Differentiable Rendering. Autodiff optimization using bwd_diff.
Module 05: 3D Gaussian Splatting. Explicit Differentiable Primitives.
Added learning-neural-rendering link to the top hub index.html.
Refactored the 'Add' UI into a categorized dropdown menu (Math & Symmetry, Organic & Biological, Material Tests, XCS Tests).
Implemented Voronoi, Hilbert Curve, and Palette Grid generators with categorised menu.
Implemented proportional scaling and Symmetry logic (highlights button when dot count matches symmetric value) in Dot Mandala.
Upgraded color selection with custom floating dropdowns, popout tooltips, and synchronized Color Range mode (treating center dot as Ring 0).
Updated XCS Viewer Popup to display palette/color names and handled SVG fill rendering for black layers.
Upgraded persistence to dynamic save/load for all 6 pattern types (Mandala, Gradient, Bitmap Line, Voronoi, Hilbert, Palette Grid).
Symmetry & Mandala Pack: Girih Tilings, Flower of Life, Penrose P2, Islamic Star Grids, Hexagonal Honeycomb, Concentric Polygons, Sacred Geometry, Archimedean Spirals, Fermat’s Spiral, Rose Curves.
Fractal & Recursion Pack: Sierpinski Gasket, Sierpinski Carpet, Koch Snowflake, Dragon Curve, Mandelbrot Boundary, Julia Sets, Pythagoras Tree, Menger Sponge, Vicsek Fractal, Barnsley Fern.
Space-Filling Paths: Hilbert Curve, Peano Curve, Gosper Curve, Moore Curve, Sierpinski Arrowhead, Lebesgue O-curve, Z-order Curve, H-tree, L-System Grids, Dragon Folding.

Chaotic Attractors: Lorenz Attractor, Rossler Attractor, Ikeda Map, Clifford Attractor, Peter de Jong Attractor, Bedhead Attractor, Gumowski-Mira Map, Strange Attractor (Hénon), Duffing Map, Chirikov Standard Map.

Organic & Biological: Turing Reaction-Diffusion, Diffusion-Limited Aggregation, Gray-Scott Spots, Belousov-Zhabotinsky Spirals, Phyllotaxis Sunflower, Voronoi Stippling, Lloyd's Relaxation, Delaunay Mesh, L-System Algae, L-System Waving Kelp.

Waveforms & Harmonics: Chladni Figures, Lissajous Curves, Harmonograph, Fourier Series, Epicycles, Beats (Interference), Moire Grids, Standing Wave Envelopes, Trochoids (Cycloids), Hypocycloids (Spirograph).

Projections & Hypergeometry: Stereographic Projection, Poincaré Disk, Klein Bottle Slices, Möbius Strip Path, Tesseract (4D), Orthographic Polyhedra, Perspective Grids, Anamorphic Distortion, Mercator Mapping, Gnomonic Projection.

Dithering & Texture: Truchet Tiles (Curves), Truchet Tiles (Triangles), Wang Tiles, Halftone Dots, Blue Noise Dither, Floyd-Steinberg Paths, Ordered Dithering, Stipple Raster, Quadtree Partitions, Voronoi Crackling.

Illusions & Geometry: Penrose Triangle, Penrose Stairs, Necker Cube, Impossible Overlaps, Escher Ribbon Spirals, Ambiguous Cylinders, Scintillating Grid, Herman Grid, Café Wall Illusion, Zöllner Illusion.

Advanced Mathematical: Apollonian Gasket, Steiner Chain, Pappus Chain, Ford Circles, Arbelos Variations, Malfatti Circles, Clifford Torus Slices, Enneper Surface, Mobius-Kantor Graph, Desargues Theorem.
